Geddy Lucier
Price Data Cleaning Script
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(dplyr) # Data Manipulation
library(lubridate) # Date manipulation
library(ggplot2) # Visualization
library(riem) # Weather api from airport observations

prices <- read_csv("~/Documents/GitHub/Algonquin_NatGas/data/prices_new.csv")

zone_load <- read_csv("~/Documents/GitHub/Algonquin_NatGas/data/zone_load.csv")
mix_load <- read_csv("~/Documents/GitHub/Algonquin_NatGas/data/region_fuelmix_targeted.csv") #Region LEVEL
```


Price Data Cleaning 
```{r}

chicago <- prices[c(1,2)] %>% rename("Date" = "Date...1")
algonquin <- prices[c(3,4)]  %>% rename("Date" = "Date...3")

master_dates <- chicago %>%
  select("Date") %>%
  distinct()

prices <- chicago %>%
  left_join(algonquin, by = "Date")

target_dates <- prices %>%
  filter(!is.na(boston) & !is.na(chicago)) %>%
  pull(Date) %>%
  sort()
```
Load and Mix cleaning 
```{r}
head(zone_load, 10)
tail(zone_load,10)

#
zone_load <- zone_load %>% 
  arrange(desc(period)) %>% filter(timezone == "Eastern") 

daily_total <- mix_load %>%
  group_by(date, respondent) %>%
  summarise(total_mwh = sum(daily_mwh, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

mix_df <- mix_load %>%
  left_join(daily_total, by = c("date", "respondent")) %>%
  mutate(class = ifelse(`type-name` %in% c("Solar", "Hydro",
                                            "Battery storage", "Wind"),
                        "green", "traditional")) %>%
  group_by(date, respondent, class) %>%
  summarise(
    total_renewable = sum(daily_mwh, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_mwh       = first(total_mwh),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(pct_of_total = total_renewable / total_mwh * 100)
```


```{r}
mix_df %>%
  filter(class == "green") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = date, y = pct_of_total, color = respondent)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.8, alpha = 0.8) +
  facet_wrap(~ respondent, ncol = 1) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("ISNE" = "#2A9D8F", "PJM" = "#E76F51")) +
  scale_x_date(date_labels = "%b %Y", date_breaks = "6 months") +
  labs(
    title = "Renewable Energy as Share of Total Generation",
    subtitle = "ISO New England vs. PJM Interconnection",
    x = "Date",
    y = "Renewable Share (%)",
    caption = "Source: Energy Information Authority, Renewables defined as Solar, Hydro, and Battery Storage."
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_family = "serif") +
  theme(
    plot.title       = element_text(face = "bold", size = 13),
    plot.subtitle    = element_text(size = 10, color = "gray30"),
    strip.text       = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11),
    legend.position  = "none",      # redundant with facet labels
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x      = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
  )
```
```{r}

zone_load %>%
  mutate(
    date = as.Date(period),
    region = case_when(
      subba == "4008" ~ "Boston",
      subba == "CE"   ~ "Chicago",
      TRUE ~ subba
    )
  ) %>%
  group_by(date, region) %>%
  summarise(daily_mwh = sum(value, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = date, y = daily_mwh / 1000, color = region)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.5, alpha = 0.8) +
  facet_wrap(~ region, ncol = 1, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Boston" = "#2A9D8F", "Chicago" = "#E76F51")) +
  scale_x_date(date_labels = "%b %Y", date_breaks = "6 months") +
  labs(
    title    = "Daily Electricity Demand by City Region",
    subtitle = "Boston vs. Chicago",
    x        = "Date",
    y        = "Daily Load (GWh)",
    caption  = "Source: U.S. Energy Information Administration, Form EIA-930."
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    plot.title       = element_text(face = "bold", size = 13),
    plot.subtitle    = element_text(size = 10, color = "gray30"),
    plot.caption     = element_text(size = 7, color = "gray40", hjust = 0),
    strip.text       = element_text(color = "white", face = "bold", size = 11),
    legend.position  = "none",
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x      = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
  )
```

```{r}
write_csv(mix_df, file = "~/Documents/GitHub/Algonquin_NatGas/data/mix_load_df.csv")
```



Plotting
```{r}
ggplot(prices, aes(x = Date)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = chicago,  color = "Chicago"),   linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_line(aes(y = boston,   color = "Algonquin"), linewidth = 1.2) +
  scale_color_manual(
    name   = "Hub",
    values = c("Chicago" = "#264653", "Algonquin" = "#E76F51")
  ) +
  scale_x_date(date_labels = "%b %Y", date_breaks = "6 months") +
  labs(
    title    = "Natural Gas Hub Prices: Chicago vs. Algonquin",
    subtitle = "Monthly spot prices in USD per MMBtu",
    x        = "Date",
    y        = "Price (USD/MMBtu)"
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    plot.title       = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    plot.subtitle    = element_text(size = 10, color = "gray30"),
    legend.position  = "bottom",
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x      = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 10))

```

```{r}
prices %>%
  mutate(spread = chicago - boston) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Date, y = spread)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2, color = "#2E86AB") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "red", linewidth = 0.8) +
  scale_x_date(date_labels = "%b %Y", date_breaks = "6 months") +
  labs(
    title    = "Natural Gas Price Spread: Chicago vs. Algonquin",
    subtitle = "Chicago minus Algonquin (USD/MMBtu) — positive values indicate Chicago premium",
    x        = "Date",
    y        = "Spread (USD/MMBtu)"
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    plot.title       = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    plot.subtitle    = element_text(size = 10, color = "gray30"),
    legend.position  = "bottom",
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x      = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
  )
```






```{r}
#write_csv(prices, file = "~/Documents/GitHub/Algonquin_NatGas/data/price_data_final.csv")
```
